---
title: "Value for Money Evaluation Knowledge Base"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.hero-panel}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Evaluation evidence and judgement</span>

# Value for money evaluation

This knowledge base organises practical notes on value for money evaluation: how evaluators define criteria, assemble evidence, make transparent judgements, and report credible conclusions.

::: {.cta-row}
[Open Notes](notes/index.qmd){.cta-button}
[Start with Definitions](notes/vfm-definitions.qmd){.cta-button .secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-overview">Source note</span>

### [VfM Definitions](notes/vfm-definitions.qmd)

Compare authoritative definitions from HM Treasury, the National Audit Office, and OECD DAC.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-overview">Source note</span>

### [Magenta Book VfM Evaluation](notes/magenta-book-vfm-evaluation.qmd)

Read the source note on HM Treasury's guidance for value for money evaluation.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-overview">Knowledge map</span>

### [Notes Map](notes/index.qmd#notes-map)

Explore the emerging relationship between pages, citations, and linked source material.
:::
:::

</div>
